title: Backrooms: Found Footage
description: The Best Backrooms Experience for Minecraft
body: # Backrooms: Found Footage The Best Backrooms Experience for Minecraft * * * * * ## How To Play To enter the Backroom world, once you create a world, you have to find a way to get buried, such as dropping blocks, sand, or gravel on yourself. Then you will be sent to the Backrooms * * * * * ### Basic Controls - Shift - Run - Ctrl - Sneak - F - Flashlight - C - Zoom - B - Set Up Voice Chat - Middle Mouse - Ping * * * * * ### If you want to play this modpack with friends, I recommend using Bisec Hosting ![Sponsor](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/9c4f586e-9e81-4430-8fdc-d68f1e20e38d.webp) * * * * * ## Description This modpack is a more stable version of the "Minecraft Backrooms Found Footage" mod with some gameplay improvements. ⚠️ **Minecraft Backrooms Found Footage Mod does not support performance mods like Sodium, Optifine or Vulkan, which can cause performance issues on low-end PCs.** **_A video by the creator of The Backrooms Mod_** ⬇️
